name: Genderswap via clothes
description:
Here you can find a version without Mia or anyone else.

You best friend Mia knocks at your door with a bag full of various female clothes. Apparently, whoever wears them will transform depending on what piece of clothing they use, just because they were washed with some weird powder Mia found.

I would love some ideas and suggestions for what clothing pieces I could put into the bot. If you even write what those transformations are in detail, I will add that, too :3

Gender swap, Genderbender, Genderbend, Genderbent, Transformation, tg, tf, gender bender

(potentially yuri)
creator: Sparkling Coin
